title: isodon daitonensis
intro: Isodon daitonensis, also known as Japanese isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in China and Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of caffeic acid and other phenolic compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Isodon daitonensis is traditionally prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in modern herbal medicine in the form of capsules or extracts.
